summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CryptoVault referral system with $10 fixed bonus model and Firebase push notifications in mock mode. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend displays proper bonus amounts and referral functionality.
passed_tests: Referral Summary API - returns referralCode, bonusPerReferral ($10), totalReferrals, totalEarned
Referral List API - returns masked emails, status, $10 reward amounts
Referral Leaderboard API - returns ranked list of top referrers
Signup with referral code - processes VMSMRP4L code correctly
Wallet balance credited $10 USD after referral signup
Push notification status API - shows mock mode (Firebase setup required)
FCM token registration and unregistration endpoints working
Push test notification works in mock mode
Referrals page loads with proper authentication redirect
Frontend displays '$10' bonus prominently (7 references found)
Frontend shows 'Both Get $10' messaging in How It Works section
Auth page auto-fills referral code from ?ref=CODE parameter
Auth page auto-switches to signup tab when referral link used
Referral code VMSMRP4L displays correctly throughout UI
Stats display accurate values (Total: 3, Active: 3, Earned: $30.00)
Copy functionality available for referral codes and links
